page: OVHcloud d2-8 is an entry-level virtual server belonging to the Discovery family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Core Processor (Haswell, no TSX) with 4 vCPUs and 4 physical cores. The CPU operates at a base speed of 2.0 GHz with shared CPU allocation and no hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core, along with 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng and Geekbench falls into the bottom 10%, while multi-core performance and memory bandwidth tests consistently rank in the bottom 25%. Cryptographic and compression workloads, such as gzip and bzip3, also register in the lower percentiles. This resource profile indicates a highly cost-efficient tier designed for non-critical workloads where raw processing power is secondary to budget considerations.

Given the shared CPU allocation and modest performance metrics, the d2-8 is designed for lightweight, non-production environments. Appropriate workloads include basic web serving, software development testing, small-scale database operations, and learning environments.
description: OVHcloud d2-8 is an entry-level virtual server from the Discovery family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 4 vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel Core Processor (Haswell) running at 2.0 GHz with shared CPU allocation. The instance includes 8.0 GB of RAM and 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Benchmark results indicate modest performance, with single-core and multi-core CPU metrics placing the server in the lower percentiles. Memory bandwidth and compression speeds also reflect its budget-oriented design. This server is highly cost-efficient for resource-light applications, making it appropriate for development sandboxes, basic web serving, and lightweight testing environments where high-compute resources are not required.
og_description: OVHcloud d2-8 is a budget-friendly Discovery family virtual server featuring 4 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 50 GB of NVMe SSD storage, designed for lightweight development and testing workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud d2-8 is a KVM-based virtual server with 4 shared vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 50 GB NVMe storage, configured for basic testing and development.
tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server with shared CPU resources and local NVMe storage for lightweight development and testing workloads.
bullet_points: 4 vCPUs and 8.0 GB RAM on a shared Intel Haswell architecture
50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for basic disk I/O needs
KVM hypervisor virtualization with one public IPv4 address
Cost-efficient resource profile suited for budget-conscious projects
Appropriate for lightweight web serving, development sandboxes, and testing
